xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__LOG_SLICE_HDR
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Slice index when the event was logged"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__MEM_CURR_BYTES
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Running count of bytes processed in current operation"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__DES_LAST_OVERRUN
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Last task ID to overrun its allocation"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__DES_EFF_TIME_SEC
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Time at which new time becomes effective"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__DES_MET_VTC_SET_TIME
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Last MET time the VTC was set"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__DES_CPU_USAGE
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Percent CPU usage for last completed cycle"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__LED_A_ST
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Which LED in Bank A is currently on (0 if none)"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__LED_B_ST
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Which LED in Bank B is currently on (0 if none)"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__LED_A_LVL
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Current level of Bank A LED (0 off)"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__LED_B_LVL
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Current level of Bank B LED (0 off)"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__LED_CYCLE_BNK
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "LED Bank setting for duty cycle operation"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__LED_CYCLE_ID
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "LED ID setting for duty cycle operation"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__LED_CYCLE_START_TM
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Start time of most recent duty cycle operation"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__LED_CYCLE_ON_TM
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "LED On time setting for duty cycle operation"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__LED_CYCLE_OFF_TM
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "LED Off time setting for duty cycle operation"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__LED_CYCLE_LVL_A
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "LED Level setting for bank A, in DN"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__LED_CYCLE_LVL_B
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "LED Level setting for bank B, in DN"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__HTR_TEMP_RCM_PX
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Heater temperature using onboard conversion from table, Celsius"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__HTR_TEMP_RCM_MX
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Heater temperature using onboard conversion from table, Celsius"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__HTR_TEMP_WFOV
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Heater temperature using onboard conversion from table, Celsius"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__ADC_N15_IMON
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "PE Pwr Bd N15V Current Monitor, in milliAmp"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__ADC_P3P3_IMON
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "PE Pwr Bd P3.3V Current Monitor, in milliAmp"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__ADC_P5_IMON
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "PE Pwr Bd P5V Current Monitor, in milliAmp"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__ADC_P15_IMON
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "PE Pwr Bd P15V Current Monitor, in milliAmp"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__ADC_ERR_CNT
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Number of errors reported by Cobham ADC, can be once every sample"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__ADC_ERR_LAST
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Describes most recent Cobham ADC error, upper 16 bits of DATA register"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__BD_PASS
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Board I/O passivated due to ID mismatch"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__MSG_RCV_SEC
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Local time in seconds when the last time message was received"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__MSG_RCV_SUB
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Local time in subsecond when the last time message was received"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__PPS_RCV_SEC
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Local time in seconds when the last time pulse was received"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__PPS_RCV_SUB
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Local time in subseconds when the last time pulse was received"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__TIME_UP_CNT
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Number of time updates that have been performed"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__TIME_SINCE_MSG
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Time in seconds since the last message."

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__TIME_SINCE_UP
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Time in seconds since the last time sync."

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__TIME_SYNC_MAX
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Max Number of seconds between time sync (PPS) since reset"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__TIME_SYNC_MIN
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Min Number of seconds between time sync (PPS) since reset"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__NOR_TO_CNT_CODE0
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Number of NOR Flash busy timeout errors"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__NOR_RD_ERR_CODE0
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Number of NOR Flash read timeout errors"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__NOR_WR_ERR_CODE0
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Number of NOR Flash write timeout errors"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__NOR_ERS_ERR_CODE0
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Number of NOR Flash erase timeout errors"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__NOR_TO_CNT_CODE1
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Number of NOR Flash busy timeout errors"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__NOR_RD_ERR_CODE1
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Number of NOR Flash read timeout errors"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__NOR_WR_ERR_CODE1
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Number of NOR Flash write timeout errors"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__NOR_ERS_ERR_CODE1
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Number of NOR Flash erase timeout errors"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__NOR_TO_CNT_CODE2
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Number of NOR Flash busy timeout errors"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__NOR_RD_ERR_CODE2
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Number of NOR Flash read timeout errors"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__NOR_WR_ERR_CODE2
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Number of NOR Flash write timeout errors"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__NOR_ERS_ERR_CODE2
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Number of NOR Flash erase timeout errors"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__NOR_TO_CNT_CODE3
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Number of NOR Flash busy timeout errors"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__NOR_RD_ERR_CODE3
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Number of NOR Flash read timeout errors"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__NOR_WR_ERR_CODE3
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Number of NOR Flash write timeout errors"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__NOR_ERS_ERR_CODE3
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Number of NOR Flash erase timeout errors"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__NOR_TO_CNT_IDX
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Number of NOR Flash busy timeout errors"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__NOR_RD_ERR_IDX
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Number of NOR Flash read timeout errors"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__NOR_WR_ERR_IDX
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Number of NOR Flash write timeout errors"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__NOR_ERS_ERR_IDX
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Number of NOR Flash erase timeout errors"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__NOR_TO_CNT_ALL
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Number of NOR Flash busy timeout errors"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__NOR_RD_ERR_ALL
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Number of NOR Flash read timeout errors"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__NOR_WR_ERR_ALL
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Number of NOR Flash write timeout errors"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__NOR_ERS_ERR_ALL
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Number of NOR Flash erase timeout errors"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__NOR_BUSY
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Status of Cobham NOR Flash busy (reads busy if unpowered)"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__NOR_PWR_DN_TMOUT
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Counts timeouts associated with NOR Flash power up"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__NOR_PWR_UP_TMOUT
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Counts timeouts associated with NOR Flash power down"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__NOR_WR_BSY_TMOUT
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Counts timeouts associated with NOR Flash Controller busy for write"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__NOR_WR_OP_TMOUT
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Counts timeouts associated with NOR Flash write operation"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__SW_BD_PASS
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Board I/O passivated due to ID mismatch"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__SW_HTR_TEMP_RCM_PX
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "RCM +X htr temp using onboard conversion from table, Celsius"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__SW_HTR_TEMP_RCM_NX
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "RCM -X htr temp using onboard conversion from table, Celsius"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__SW_HTR_TEMP_WFOV
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "WFOV htr temp using onboard conversion from table, Celsius"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__SW_LED_A_LVL
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Level of Bank A LED (0 if LEDs off)"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__SW_LED_B_LVL
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "Level of Bank B LED (0 if LEDs off)"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__SW_LED_CYCLE_LVLA
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "LED Duty Cycle Level for bank A"

xtce:Parameter.name: PEC__SW_LED_CYCLE_LVLB
xtce:Parameter.shortDescription: "LED Duty Cycle Level for bank B"

xtce:SequenceContainer.name: CCSDSPacket
xtce:SequenceContainer.xtce:LongDescription: Super-container for telemetry and command packets

xtce:SequenceContainer.name: PEC__LED_HK
xtce:SequenceContainer.shortDescription: "LED HK Packet for PE-C Calibration LEDs"
